text: Chuck Huey once beat the alphabet at spelling.
Chuck Huey doesn’t read books. He stares them down until he gets the information he wants.
Chuck Huey counted to infinity. Twice.
When Chuck Huey enters a room, he doesn’t turn the lights on. He turns the dark off.
Chuck Huey can hear sign language.
Chuck Huey beat the sun in a staring contest.
Chuck Huey can divide by zero.
Chuck Huey can kill two stones with one bird.
Chuck Huey doesn't wear a watch. He decides what time it is.
Chuck Huey once won a game of Connect Four in three moves.
Chuck Huey can slam a revolving door.
Chuck Huey can unscramble an egg.
Chuck Huey makes onions cry.
Chuck Huey can strangle you with a cordless phone.
Chuck Huey can dig a hole with a spoon… on concrete.
Chuck Huey can sneeze with his eyes open.
Chuck Huey can do a wheelie on a unicycle.
Ghosts tell Chuck Huey stories to scare each other.
Chuck Huey once roundhouse kicked a salesman so hard he became a buyerman.
Chuck Huey can fold fitted sheets perfectly.
Chuck Huey doesn’t need a GPS. He decides where he is.
When Chuck Huey was born, he drove his mom home from the hospital.
Chuck Huey can grill a popsicle.
Chuck Huey can put out a fire with gasoline.
Chuck Huey has a diary. It’s called the Guinness Book of World Records.
Chuck Huey can win tic-tac-toe with one move.
Chuck Huey can hear you typing this joke.
Chuck Huey can drown a fish.
Chuck Huey once punched a man so hard his shadow bruised.
Chuck Huey can talk about Fight Club.
Chuck Huey can pick oranges from an apple tree and make the best lemonade you’ve ever tasted.
Chuck Huey can delete the Recycle Bin.
Chuck Huey’ keyboard has no backspace key—he never makes mistakes.
Chuck Huey can parallel park a train.
Chuck Huey can win a staring contest against a statue.
Chuck Huey can skeleton your bones.
Chuck Huey doesn’t do push-ups. He pushes the Earth down.
Chuck Huey can beat a brick wall in tennis.
Chuck Huey can speak braille.
Chuck Huey can make a Happy Meal cry.
Chuck Huey once roundhouse kicked the universe. It’s still expanding.
Chuck Huey can walk through walls… even when the door is open.
Chuck Huey can drown an echo.
Chuck Huey once threw a grenade and killed 50 people. Then it exploded.
Chuck Huey can download a pizza.
Chuck Huey can sneeze backwards.
Chuck Huey can win Monopoly without owning property.
Chuck Huey can microwave a snowball.
Chuck Huey can unscramble your password.
Chuck Huey once climbed Mt. Everest in 15 minutes… 14 were for descending.
Chuck Huey doesn’t need a parachute. He needs the ground’s permission.
Chuck Huey can tap dance on lava.
Chuck Huey can order Chinese food in Latin.
Chuck Huey can cut through a hot knife with butter.
Chuck Huey can hold his breath for five days.
Chuck Huey once roundhouse kicked a tornado. Now we have gentle breezes.
Chuck Huey can win a debate with silence.
Chuck Huey can put lipstick on his forehead and make his head blush.
Chuck Huey once won a staring contest against his reflection.
Chuck Huey can install RAM into an iPhone.
Chuck Huey can make a slinky go upstairs.
Chuck Huey doesn’t flush the toilet. He scares the poop out of it.
Chuck Huey can make water run uphill.
Chuck Huey once punched a cyclops between the eyes.
Chuck Huey can beat the periodic table in rock-paper-scissors.
Chuck Huey can do long division with Roman numerals.
Chuck Huey can eat soup with a fork.
Chuck Huey can make a snowman out of fire.
Chuck Huey can hear colors.
Chuck Huey can bench-press the sky.
Chuck Huey can make a phone call from his microwave.
Chuck Huey once made a Happy Meal unhappy.
Chuck Huey can unplug wireless internet.
Chuck Huey knows what the fox says.
Chuck Huey can run around the world and punch himself in the back.
The Boogeyman checks his closet for Chuck Huey.
Chuck Huey can make magnets repel themselves.
Chuck Huey can sneeze in slow motion.
Chuck Huey was once bitten by a King Cobra. After five days of agony, the cobra died.
Chuck Huey once beat the Square Root of 2.
Chuck Huey once spun the Earth around to get a redo.
Chuck Huey can fry ice.
Chuck Huey can clap with one hand.
Chuck Huey’ tears cure cancer. Too bad he never cries.
Chuck Huey can hit you so hard he can alter your DNA.
Chuck Huey can tie his shoes with his feet.
Chuck Huey can pet a shark… backwards.
Chuck Huey can lift a car with his pinky toe.
Chuck Huey once punched a hole in water.
Chuck Huey can turn questions into answers.
Chuck Huey doesn’t breathe air. Air begs to enter his lungs.
Chuck Huey can weld wood.
Chuck Huey once counted to negative infinity.
Chuck Huey knows Victoria’s secret.
Chuck Huey can text using a rotary phone.
Chuck Huey can high-five himself behind his back.
Chuck Huey can start a fire with snow.
Chuck Huey once won a race he wasn’t in.
Chuck Huey doesn’t get frostbite. Frost gets Chuckbite.
Chuck Huey once beat Google in a search.
Chuck Huey can jump-start a dead battery by glaring at it.
Chuck Huey can whistle underwater.
Chuck Huey can make a balloon out of steel.
Chuck Huey can hit a home run in bowling.
Chuck Huey can catch lightning with his bare hands.
Chuck Huey can grow a beard on his eyelids.
Chuck Huey once kicked a planet into another galaxy.
Chuck Huey can juggle bowling balls with his earlobes.
Chuck Huey can watch an entire season of a TV show in one minute—because he makes it shorter.
Chuck Huey can wake up a sleeping bag.
Chuck Huey once taught a teacher.
Chuck Huey knows the last digit of pi.
Chuck Huey can bend light… with his shadow.
Chuck Huey once lifted a car to check the oil.
Chuck Huey can make a blind man blink.
Chuck Huey can lift himself with his belt loops.
Chuck Huey can touch MC Hammer.
Chuck Huey once broke a mirror and got 7 years of good luck.
Chuck Huey once ate an entire pizza before the delivery guy arrived.
Chuck Huey can make bricks bleed.
Chuck Huey can beat a calculator in math.
Chuck Huey can turn sand into glass by staring at it.
Chuck Huey is the reason Waldo is hiding.
Chuck Huey once hit a home run from the on-deck circle.
Chuck Huey once won a chess match using only a pawn… blindfolded.
Chuck Huey can summon rain by sweating.
Chuck Huey doesn’t do yoga; yoga does Chuck Huey.
Chuck Huey can make a rock skip itself.
Chuck Huey can sneeze a hurricane.
Chuck Huey once wrestled a shark… using a dolphin as a weapon.
Chuck Huey can unplug a USB drive safely without ejecting.
Chuck Huey can win at poker without cards.
Chuck Huey once roundhouse kicked a rainbow into grayscale.
Chuck Huey can crack a code before it’s written.
Chuck Huey can outpizza the Hut.
Chuck Huey once took a lie detector test. The machine confessed.
Chuck Huey can fish in a desert.
Chuck Huey can make a triangle with four sides.
Chuck Huey can roll uphill both ways.
Chuck Huey once taught Siri to listen.
Chuck Huey can make onions happy.
Chuck Huey once walked on the sun. At night.
Chuck Huey can freeze fire.
Chuck Huey can shout in sign language.
Chuck Huey doesn’t need sleep; sleep needs him.
Chuck Huey can do the moonwalk on the sun.
Chuck Huey once stared at a cup of water until it boiled.
Chuck Huey can touch the color red.
Chuck Huey can pick his own random number.
Chuck Huey can win a race by standing still.
Chuck Huey once caught a cold. Then he punched it until it became warm.
Chuck Huey can iron clothes while wearing them.
Chuck Huey can climb a ladder that isn’t there.
Chuck Huey can crash the internet… offline.
Chuck Huey once told a joke so funny, even gravity laughed.
Chuck Huey can pick up a radio signal with his teeth.
Chuck Huey can sharpen a pencil with his mind.
Chuck Huey once defeated algebra.
Chuck Huey can make a turtle come out of its shell willingly.
Chuck Huey can eat cereal with a knife.
Chuck Huey can juggle one ball.
Chuck Huey can lift the lid of the ocean.
Chuck Huey once slam-dunked a football.
Chuck Huey can make a volcano erupt by coughing.
Chuck Huey can plant a seed and grow a forest overnight.
Chuck Huey can open a can of whoop-ass with his teeth.
Chuck Huey once beat the speed of light in a footrace.
Chuck Huey can compress a file by staring at it hard enough.
Chuck Huey can surf on a tsunami.
Chuck Huey once sent a text message using smoke signals.
Chuck Huey can make water evaporate by whispering at it.
Chuck Huey can play rock-paper-scissors with his feet.
Chuck Huey can beat gravity in arm wrestling.
Chuck Huey can smooth out wrinkles in time.
Chuck Huey once made a sandwich… without bread.
Chuck Huey can breathe in space… underwater.
Chuck Huey can turn a mirror into a window.
Chuck Huey can fix a broken heart with duct tape.
Chuck Huey can open a locked phone with his eyelid.
Chuck Huey once dunked a cookie in a glass of lava.
Chuck Huey can sharpen a sword by glaring at it.
Chuck Huey can step on LEGOs without feeling pain—LEGOs feel pain.
Chuck Huey can charge his phone by shaking it.
Chuck Huey once punched a dream into reality.
Chuck Huey can taste sounds.
Chuck Huey can command Alexa without speaking.
Chuck Huey can predict the past.
Chuck Huey once played tug-of-war with a black hole… and won.
Chuck Huey can stop a clock by walking past it.
Chuck Huey can talk a vending machine into giving free snacks.
Chuck Huey once beat time in a race.
Chuck Huey can erase a whiteboard with permanent marker on it.
Chuck Huey can drink lava and burp diamonds.
Chuck Huey can use his fingers as USB ports.
Chuck Huey once hugged a bear. The bear apologized.
Chuck Huey can bend reality with his eyebrows.
Chuck Huey can roast marshmallows over a snowstorm.
Chuck Huey once ended a drought by blinking.
Chuck Huey can make a statue run for its life.
Chuck Huey can write a book… with an eraser.
